description: opensource.org is the website of the Open Source Initiative, the steward of the Open Source Definition and the canonical list of OSI Approved Licenses. It publishes information about open source licensing and related policy, community, and programs.
summary: opensource.org exposes one public HTTP API for OSI Approved Licenses data at https://opensource.org/api/license; no GraphQL, MCP, CLI, or developer-issued credentials were found.
